transcript: @lua/plugins/markdown.lua here is my nvim markdown configuration. I am using the `render-markdown` to preview the markdown. Create a command so that I can swith the preview mode and raw mode.

events.resultSummary:
local render_markdown = {
	"MeanderingProgrammer/render-markdown.nvim",
	ft = "markdown",
	dependencies = { "nvim-treesitter/nvim-treesitter", "nvim-tree/nvim-web-devicons" }, -- if you prefer nvim-web-devicons
	---@module 'render-markdown'
